perplexity_sources: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities
citation_gap_analysis.content_gap: Competitors are focusing on 'how to avoid' via income reduction (HSA, tax-loss harvesting). None are discussing 'Recaptured Capital'—the pivot from lost subsidies to building private wealth through IUL. Current top-cited content (WUSF, NBC) is reporting the problem but missing the fiduciary solution for high-earning early retirees and self-employed professionals.
